violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed containers in refrigerators and walk in cooler that were not date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of pizza ovens need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed outside of pizza ovens need to be cleaned.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service items on floor in pantry.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed items in hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Observed duct tape on floor of walk in cooler. Duct tape is not a cleanable material.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
